hero.title: Terms of Use
hero.subtitle: Effective: From the moment of use

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
content: The UltraTech website ("the Site") is a platform that allows users to purchase, create, and upload digital business cards.
Use of the Site is subject to acceptance of these Terms of Use and the Privacy Policy published on the Site.
Any use of the Site constitutes an irrevocable agreement by the user to these terms.
The Site is intended for users 18 years and older only. Use by minors is prohibited.

definitions.title: 2. Definitions
content: "User": Any person who browses or uses the Site.
"User Content": Any information, image, logo, file, or other content uploaded by the user on the Site as part of a digital business card.
"Service": The platform that provides digital business cards and any related services on the Site.

registration.title: 3. Registration and Use
content: The user agrees to provide accurate, complete, and up-to-date information when registering or uploading a digital business card.
The user is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account credentials. The Site is not responsible for unauthorized use of the account by third parties.
The user agrees not to upload offensive, illegal, copyrighted, or privacy-infringing content, or any content that may harm others or the Site.

payment.title: 4. Purchase and Payment
content: Digital business card purchases are made via secure payment providers only (credit card, PayPal, etc.).
The Site does not store users’ credit card or other payment information.
The Site may change prices, offers, or services at its discretion.
All transactions are subject to product availability and the payment terms displayed on the Site.

userContent.title: 5. User Content
content: Users are fully responsible for the content they upload and represent that it does not infringe on third-party rights, laws, or privacy.
Users grant the Site a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use the content solely for providing the Service.
The Site may remove any content that violates the terms, law, or third-party rights at any time without prior notice.

copyright.title: 6. Copyright
content: All content on the Site that is not User Content, including designs, logos, code, and graphics, is protected by copyright and owned by the Site or authorized parties.
Copying, distributing, or using Site content without written permission from the Site owners is prohibited.

security.title: 7. Data Security and Cookies
content: The Site takes reasonable security measures, including encryption, to protect personal information.
The Site collects minimal information:
Email address for service and support purposes
Information submitted by the user in the digital business card
Site usage information via cookies and analytics systems to improve user experience
Users may disable cookies via browser settings, but some Site features may not function properly.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
content: The Site is provided 'as is' and does not guarantee continuous availability or error-free service.
The Site is not responsible for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the Site or User Content.
The Site is not responsible for damages resulting from system failure, downtime, or technical errors.

contact.title: 9. Contact and Support
content: Users may contact the Site team for questions or issues at: info@ultratech.co.il
The Site will respond to inquiries within a reasonable timeframe.

changes.title: 10. Changes to Terms or Policy
content: The Site may update the Terms of Use or Privacy Policy from time to time.
All changes will be published on the Site, and continued use constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

law.title: 11. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
content: These Terms and Privacy Policy are governed by the laws of the State of Israel.
Any dispute will be subject to the competent courts in Tel Aviv, Israel.
